---
title: "daemon.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/cstar/core/daemon.py"
loc: 116
complexity: 14
logic_score: 1.42
style_score: 3.74
intel_score: 5.19
overall_score: 3.43
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating engine_search_sync, process_command. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 1.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.2/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 41 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [gc](file://gc)
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [re](file://re)
- [secrets](file://secrets)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [time](file://time)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [psutil](file://psutil)
- [websockets](file://websockets)
- [websockets.server](file://websockets.server)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.core.sv_engine](file://src.core.sv_engine)
- [src.cstar.core.uplink](file://src.cstar.core.uplink)

### Exports
- `engine_search_sync`
- `process_command`
- `handle_client`
- `execute_sleep_protocol`
- `async_start_daemon`
- `start_daemon`
